sample_id.description: Unique identifier for the sample record, e.g. 'bench-v1-0001'

is_valid_part.description: True if the extraction identifies a real, specific electronic component with a valid or plausible MPN. False for board models, designator lists, OCR artifacts, date codes, generic labels.

label_pending_review.description: True if the label has not been reviewed by a human yet. Must be false for all records before benchmark runs.

reviewer_notes.description: Optional notes from the human reviewer explaining the label decision.
